name: config_timing_pessimism
short_description: Configure timing analysis common node pessimism removal settings
full_help:
config_timing_pessimism

Description: 
Configure timing analysis common node pessimism removal settings

Syntax: 
config_timing_pessimism  [-enable] [-disable] [-transition <arg>]
                         [-threshold <arg>] [-common_node <arg>] [-quiet]
                         [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name            Description
  ---------------------------
  [-enable]       Enable common node pessimism removal 
  [-disable]      Disable common node pessimism removal 
  [-transition]   Remove pessimism for specified transitions; Values: 
                  any_transition, same_transition
  [-threshold]    Common node pessimism threshold
                  Default: 0
  [-common_node]  Perform pessimism removal to common node in routing 
                  network. Values: on, off
  [-quiet]        Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]      Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
Timing

arguments.description: Remove pessimism for specified transitions; Values: any_transition, same_transition
